raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Workload and pace","name":"How has the last couple of weeks felt from your side, Sarah?","description":"Gives Sarah room to set context on pace and pressure before the feedback gets specific.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Impact in practice","name":"What changed because of your work that would not have happened otherwise?","description":"Forces a concrete account of leverage and outcome rather than a delivery recap.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Signal to stakeholders","name":"How did you make your work visible to the people who needed to see it?","description":"Surfaces the mechanisms she uses to raise signal beyond the immediate team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Boundary friction","name":"Where did cross-functional friction slow you down most?","description":"Looks for the specific boundary where coordination or alignment cost time.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility gap","name":"What part of your contribution is easiest for others to miss?","description":"Tests whether she can identify where her work is under-sold or under-observed.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Leverage choices","name":"Where do you choose to go deep instead of pulling others in earlier?","description":"Probes the judgment call between execution depth and earlier alignment.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder habits","name":"What do you do now to keep stakeholders in the loop before the work is done?","description":"Surfaces the practical habits she uses to build trust and avoid surprise.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Friction response","name":"When a cross-team issue comes up, what is your first move?","description":"Reveals whether she escalates, pre-wires, or absorbs the issue herself.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Raise the signal","name":"What would you change in your current approach to raise your signal with stakeholders?","description":"Gets at a concrete plan for visibility rather than hoping strong work speaks for itself.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step commitment","name":"What is one change you will make in the next two weeks to raise your visibility?","description":"Closes on a concrete behavioural commitment with a near-term date.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
